jobs.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer – Canva AI
jobs.why: Canva 放出的 Canva AI 方向 Senior MLE 岗位；AU 最具影响力的科技独角兽，专注对话式 AI 体验与 LLM 系统落地，学员当前不一定够得着，但是极强的职业目标参照系。

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer Graduate, Trust and Safety Engineering – 2026 Start
jobs.why: TikTok 全球品牌，明确 Graduate 门槛（应届 1 年内毕业），A$140K–170K 起薪；要求 ML 分类器 + NLP 基础，Bootcamp 毕业生完成 Phase 3 机器学习项目后可直接投。

jobs.tierLabel: 特殊机会 · Internship ⚠️ 截止明天
jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer Intern 2026/27
jobs.why: Canva MLE Intern 是 12 周带薪项目（2026 年 12 月 – 2027 年 2 月）；学生 / 2027–2028 届应届可申，入职门槛比正式岗位低；截止 1 May 2026（明天），需立即行动。

alternativeCandidates.title: Junior AI Engineer
alternativeCandidates.note: AU top investment bank, explicit Junior level; Python/Node.js + AWS + AI/ML project experience required

alternativeCandidates.note: AU ASX-listed proptech, associate level — good actionable backup, older posting

alternativeCandidates.title: AI Research Intern, Summer 2026/2027

alternativeCandidates.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer – Marketing AI
alternativeCandidates.note: Product + data-driven ML focus, senior level — alternative aspirational pick

alternativeCandidates.title: Senior AI Automation Engineer
alternativeCandidates.note: LangChain/LangGraph + LLM fine-tuning focus, A$130K–240K+; aspirational alternative to Canva AI role
